notes: Apex Mode = automated active DEFENSE only (detect deauth -> harden PMF / redirect link / dispatch containment to a managed AP/controller / log evidence). It never transmits attack frames. To arm: set lab_mode=true AND apex_active_response=true, run the detector with --apex. harden_pmf/redirect modify the protected NetworkManager connection (set protected_connection/backup_connection) and can drop that link, so keep a separate management path (ethernet). contain POSTs the attacker MAC to your controller's blacklist API (set containment.blacklist_url). protect_bssids are never acted against.
